label: Security
items: Plant Doctor and Generate Guide edge functions now authenticate every request before reading server config. Closes an info-leak / auth-bypass corner that could surface on misconfigured deploys.

label: Bulk paste plants
items: Got a list of 20 plants you want to add at once? Tap "Bulk paste" next to Find a plant. Paste your list — one plant per line — and Rhozly will split out the name + variety + quantity for you. Edit the review step, then add the whole batch to your Shed in one tap.
Sage tier gets a fuzzy AI parser that handles messier lists (typos, weird spacing, mixed punctuation). Free + Botanist users get a fast regex parser that handles the common shapes.

label: Free Plant Doctor
items: Identify any plant for free — 5 free identifications per rolling 7-day window for every gardener, no upgrade needed. Take a photo, tap Identify, get the species. Diagnosis and Multi-ID stay on Sage for now.
Free identifications show a counter so you always know how many you've got left this week. Once they're gone, you'll see when they reset back to 5.

label: Onboarding & polish
items: New users go straight from Home Setup to the dashboard — no more upfront tier picker. Pick a plan when you're ready: tap "Upgrade Rhozly" in the user menu.
Experienced gardener? The Welcome tour now has an "I'm experienced — skip the tour" express lane on the first slide. Sets your persona to experienced so future copy is terser, no more coach marks.
Today's Tasks empty state now nudges you toward setting up your first watering / pruning / harvesting schedule rather than just saying "No tasks!".
The Shed empty state has a clear "Add your first plant" CTA when your library is brand-new.
"Add to Shed" wording is now consistent across every entry point (search, Plant Doctor, Plan staging, shopping list, manual creation).
Frequency hint under the "Repeat every (days)" input now adapts to the task type — different ranges for watering vs pruning vs harvesting.
Yield Predictor shows a progress bar towards 3 logged harvests so you can see why early predictions feel fuzzy.
Desktop dashboard now surfaces a "Start a Garden Walk" card once you have 5+ plants — same morning ritual already on mobile.
Search shortcut chip now shows ⌘K on Mac, Ctrl+K on Windows / Linux.
Smart Planting, Garden Intelligence, and the free identify counter all gained "what does this mean?" tooltips. Tap the small ? to read the explanation.

label: Rookie-power batch
items: Plant page → Care Schedules now has a one-tap "Quick Water" button. Sets up a recurring watering reminder for every instance of this plant using its preferred interval — no form to fill in.
Dismissing the Garden Quiz reminder no longer hides it forever. The default is a 2-week snooze; a separate "Don't ask again" option is there for users who genuinely don't want it.
Saved a guide? A new "Show saved only" chip filters the Rhozly Guides list down to just your bookmarks.
Tier Selection + Welcome tour now have a proper desktop layout (2×2 grid for tiers, wider modal) instead of a phone-sized card lost in the middle of the screen.
Help & FAQ now has a first-class entry: type rhozly.app/help or pick "Help & FAQ" in the user dropdown to land on App Help.
Mobile users get a second user dropdown at bottom-right of the Quick Access screen so the menu sits inside the thumb zone.
